body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: advanced
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #176"
objective: "Fixture for work-unit authority checking."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
  - docs/control/VALIDATION_STRATEGY.md
  - docs/QUICKSTART.md
  - docs/handoff/CURRENT_STATUS.md
  - examples/work_unit.*
  - examples/negative/work_unit.*
expected_output:
  - one validation PR
plan:
  - add check
checklist:
  - check passes
acceptance_sheet:
  - fixture passes
non_goals:
  - runtime write interception
stop_conditions:
  - changed path outside allowed_paths
rollback_expectations:
  - revert the PR
```
